text_018_leading_manufacturer_of_esd_ma: LEADING MANUFACTURER OF ESD MAT SINCE 1998
text_019_factory_direct_esd_rubber_mats: Factory-Direct ESD Rubber Mats | 25 Years, 30+ Lines, 50+ Countries
text_020_dual_layer_esd_mat_point_to_po: Dual-layer ESD mat, point-to-point resistance 10⁶–10⁹ Ω, thickness 1.6–5mm. RoHS 2.0 + SGS tested — at 1/10 the price of branded alternatives.
text_025_from_semiconductor_fabs_to_ems: From semiconductor fabs to EMS assembly lines — our ESD mats protect hundreds of thousands of workstations daily.
text_026_logos_shown_for_illustration_r: Active OEM supply relationships. Verified references available on request.
text_030_from_cleanrooms_to_repair_benc: From cleanrooms to repair benches — engineered for every workstation that handles sensitive electronics.
text_032_class_100_1000_cleanroom_envir: Class 100–1000 cleanroom environments. Surface resistance stable across temperature range, batch-to-batch consistency verified by 8-point testing.
text_034_smt_lines_pcb_assembly_and_dev: SMT lines, PCB assembly, and device manufacturing floors. Dual-layer construction safely dissipates human-body ESD — supports yield improvement.
text_036_phone_laptop_and_consumer_elec: Phone, laptop, and consumer electronics repair benches. Abrasion-resistant and flame-retardant — 400°C no ignition, -30°C to +300°C no discoloration.
text_038_qc_labs_r_d_facilities_and_esd: QC labs, R&D facilities, and ESD-safe testing environments. 99.99% antibacterial (ISO 22196:2011) and halogen-free for cleanroom safety.
text_040_25_years_of_trust_from_procure: 25+ years of trust from procurement teams, engineers, and facility managers worldwide.
text_041_we_ve_been_sourcing_from_edar: We've sourced 12,000+ rolls from EDAR over 6 years. Batch-to-batch surface resistance variance is <3% — we reduced ESD-related defects from 2.1% to 0.3% within the first year. Our Class 1000 cleanroom has been using EDAR mats exclusively since 2021.
text_042_custom_thickness_custom_color: 12-day turnaround on custom-branded mats with our Pantone-matched green. We ordered 500 rolls, paid 1/8 of what Desco quoted. Every batch arrives with SGS docs. We've placed 9 repeat orders.
text_045_india_reliability: EDAR’s ESD mats have survived 3 monsoon seasons in our Pune facility. Surface resistance still within spec, no edge curl, no discoloration. We tried cheaper suppliers twice — both failed within 6 months. Back to EDAR permanently.
text_046_malaysia_semiconductor: Penang semiconductor fab requires absolute consistency. EDAR’s batch-to-batch resistance tolerance of ±5% is the tightest we’ve measured across 6 suppliers. Their COC and lot traceability documentation passes our customer audits every single time.
text_044_vietnam_repeat_order: We’ve placed four repeat orders with EDAR in the last 18 months. Their factory-direct pricing and Hai Phong port shipment always land in our Hanoi warehouse within 10 days — exactly what our electronics assembly lines need.
text_043_rohs_3_0_certification_full_td: We distribute across 14 US states. EDAR's RoHS 3.0 + halogen-free + REACH compliance means zero customs delays. Our end customers — semiconductor fabs and defense contractors — accept EDAR's TDS/MSDS without question. 3 years, 40+ containers.
text_045_six_pillars_of_our_manufactur: Six pillars of our manufacturing promise — built on 25+ years of ESD material science.
text_046_25_years_in_house_manufacturin: 25 Years — Vertically Integrated, Not Just Assembled
text_047_from_rubber_compounding_to_cal: From rubber compounding to calendaring, vulcanization, and die-cutting — every step under one roof. 30+ production lines across 18,000m² keep lead times predictable.
text_049_factory_direct_pricing_1_10_of: Factory-Direct Pricing — 80-90% Less Than Desco, COBA, or RS Pro
text_050_no_middlemen_no_markups_fob_sh: No middlemen, no markups. FOB Shanghai / Ningbo — typically 1/8 the price of branded alternatives. Bulk discounts and consolidated shipping for mixed SKUs.
text_053_dissipative_top_layer_10_10_bo: Dissipative top layer (10⁶–10⁹ Ω) bonded to conductive bottom layer (10³–10⁵ Ω). Real ESD protection, not a surface coating.
text_055_custom_samples_in_7_days: Custom Sample in 7 Days — Risk-Free Trial
text_056_your_size_color_thickness_hard: Your size, color, thickness, hardness, logo, and packaging. Send specs → production-ready sample in 7 days.
text_059_independently_tested_by_cti_an: Independently tested by CTI and SGS. RoHS 2.0, halogen-free per IEC 61249-2-21, and full TDS/MSDS documentation included with every order.
text_062_three_industry_standard_produc: Three industry-standard product lines covering electronics assembly, repair workshops, and cleanrooms.
text_064_esd_mats_anti_fatigue_mats_and: ESD mats, anti-fatigue mats, and custom solutions for every workstation.
text_066_premium_raw_materials_full_bat: Premium raw materials, full batch traceability, compliant with RoHS 2.0 / RoHS 3.0.
text_068_specialty_carbon_black_from_a: Specialty carbon black from a leading European supplier. Ensures stable surface resistance at 10⁴–10⁹ Ω — same brand, same batch, every production run.
text_070_20_nbr_blended_with_60_70_natu: 20% NBR blended with 60–70% natural rubber base. Delivers superior elasticity, aging resistance, and worker comfort during long shifts.
text_072_rohs_2_0_compliant_mineral_col: RoHS 2.0-compliant mineral colorants — no lead, cadmium, or mercury. Available in green, blue, grey, and apple green.
text_076_independently_tested_by_cti_ch: Independently tested by CTI (China) and SGS (Switzerland). Full reports available on request.
text_078_tell_us_what_you_need_we_respo: Tell us what you need. We respond within 24 hours with pricing, samples, and lead times.
text_095_esd_rubber_mat_manufacturer_si: ESD rubber mat manufacturer since 1998. Factory-direct from Suzhou, Anhui, China. Exported to 50+ countries. ISO 9001 quality system, RoHS 2.0 + SGS certified products.
text_109_copyright_2026_edar_rubber_pla: Copyright © 2026 EDAR Rubber & Plastic Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.
text_112_suzhou_jiangsu_china: 📍 Yongqiao Economic Development Zone, Suzhou, Anhui, China
text_115_25_years_of_esd_material_scien: 25+ years of ESD material science — factory-direct from Suzhou, Anhui, China, exported to 50+ countries.
text_117_our_products_general_esd_mats: Our products — general ESD mats, RoHS 2.0/3.0 compliant mats, 2-layer and 3-layer anti-fatigue mats, and ESD PVC curtains — are exported to 50+ countries across North America, Europe, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East. We serve semiconductor fabs, EMS providers, repair workshops, and OEM/ODM customers.
text_119_three_pillars_that_drive_every: Three pillars that drive every mat we make and every order we ship.
text_121_every_mat_batch_tested_to_sj_t: Every mat batch tested to SJ/T 10694-2022 national standard. Surface resistance, tensile strength, and aging performance verified before shipment.
text_123_natural_rubber_base_heavy_meta: Natural rubber base, heavy-metal-free colorants, RoHS 2.0/3.0 compliant production. Halogen-free per IEC 61249-2-21. We protect workers and the environment.
text_125_long_term_cooperation_over_one: Long-term cooperation over one-time sales. We grow with our distributors, OEM clients, and end-users with consistent quality and on-time delivery.
text_126_our_esd_mats_protect_workstati: Our ESD mats protect workstations at semiconductor fabs, EMS providers, and device assembly lines worldwide.
text_128_send_your_inquiry_sales_repres: Send your inquiry — sales representative replies within 24 hours, sample ships in 7 days.
text_131_2_layer_and_3_layer_anti_stati: 2-layer and 3-layer anti-static mats, anti-fatigue mats, and OEM/ODM custom — engineered for electronics manufacturing, repair workshops, and cleanrooms.
text_133_the_same_esd_mats_you_see_here: The same ESD mats you see here are in use at electronics facilities worldwide — from semiconductor fabs to device assembly lines.
text_135_three_industry_standard_esd_ma: Three industry-standard ESD mat lines plus custom OEM/ODM — all RoHS 2.0 + SGS tested.
text_136_custom_esd_mat_to_your_specs_s: Custom ESD Mat to Your Specs — Sample in 7 Days
text_137_your_size_up_to_1_5m_wide_10m: Your size (up to 1.5m wide × 10m long), color (green / blue / grey / apple green), thickness (1.6–5mm), logo, and packaging. Free sample shipped in 7 days, custom quote in 24 hours.
text_140_tds_msds_rohs_2_0_3_0_test_rep: TDS, MSDS, RoHS 2.0/3.0 test reports, and installation guides. Request any document via email — reply within 24 hours.
text_142_all_documents_in_pdf_format_co: All documents in PDF format. Contact us if you need documents not listed here — we maintain full records since 1998.
text_143_full_product_specifications_th: Full product specifications: thickness (1.6–5mm), surface resistance (10⁶–10⁹ Ω dissipative / 10³–10⁵ Ω conductive), tensile strength, elongation, hardness, and temperature range.
text_146_material_safety_data_sheet_for: Material Safety Data Sheet for ESD rubber mat — composition, handling, storage, transport classification, and disposal guidance.
text_149_rohs_2_0_2011_65_eu_and_rohs_3: RoHS 2.0 (2011/65/EU) and RoHS 3.0 (EU 2015/863) compliance test reports. All 10 restricted substances tested to SGS third-party standards.
text_152_test_report_verifying_complian: Test report verifying compliance with IEC 61249-2-21 (≤1500 mg/kg chlorine, ≤900 mg/kg bromine). Required for EU electronics and cleanroom use.
text_155_full_color_catalog_product_ran: Full-color catalog — product range, specifications, ordering information, packaging, and shipping terms. Updated 2026.
text_158_best_practices_for_esd_mat_ins: Best practices for ESD mat installation, grounding kit setup, surface preparation, and ongoing maintenance to preserve 10⁶–10⁹ Ω performance.
text_161_the_6_most_common_questions_we: The 6 most common questions we hear from procurement, engineering, and facility management teams.
text_162_rohs_2_0_eu_directive_2011_65: RoHS 2.0 (EU Directive 2011/65/EU) restricts 6 hazardous substances — lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE. RoHS 3.0 (EU Directive 2015/863) adds 4 phthalate restrictions (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) for a total of 10 restricted substances. RoHS 3.0 mats are required for products sold in the EU after July 2019. EDAR offers both — most EU customers now request RoHS 3.0.
text_163_standard_sizes_1_0m_10m_1_2m_1: Standard sizes (1.0m × 10m, 1.2m × 10m) — MOQ is 50 rolls. Custom sizes / colors / logos — MOQ is 100 rolls. Sample orders have no MOQ — free samples available with shipping at buyer's cost via DHL/FedEx (3–5 business days).
text_164_yes_full_oem_odm_including_cus: Yes. Full OEM/ODM including custom formulation, color matching (to Pantone or sample), logo printing on mat backing, private label packaging, and custom thickness/hardness. Lead time: 7 days for samples, 15–25 days for OEM production after sample approval.
text_165_2_years_in_proper_storage_temp: 2 years in proper storage: temperature 30 ± 10°C, relative humidity 55 ± 15%, avoid direct sunlight and ozone. After 2 years, we recommend re-testing surface resistance before use — most mats maintain performance well beyond 2 years when stored correctly.
text_166_yes_we_offer_custom_cutting_to: Yes. We offer custom cutting to your exact dimensions — circles, irregular shapes, pre-cut workstation kits, and roll-to-strip conversion. Tolerance ±2mm on standard cuts, ±0.5mm on precision CNC cuts. Custom cuts ship within 7 days of PO.
text_167_fob_shanghai_or_fob_ningbo_are: FOB Shanghai or FOB Ningbo are standard. We can also arrange CIF, CNF, or DDP shipping to most major ports worldwide. Consolidated shipping for mixed SKUs (ESD mat + ESD PVC curtain + grounding kit) available on request to reduce per-unit logistics cost.
text_168_the_same_esd_mats_we_document: The same ESD mats we document here are in production at global electronics facilities — from semiconductor fabs to device assembly lines.
text_169_contact_edar_get_quote_in_24_h: Contact EDAR — Get Quote in 24 Hours
text_170_factory_direct_from_suzhou_chi: Factory direct from Suzhou, Anhui, China. Quote, sample, or technical support — we respond within 24 hours, Mon–Sat.
text_172_send_a_message_call_or_whatsap: Send a message, call, or WhatsApp us. Our sales team handles English, Spanish, and Chinese inquiries. Sample shipping within 3–5 business days to most countries.
text_175_quote_reply_within_24_hours_te: Quote: reply within 24 hours · Technical: 24–48 hours
text_178_best_for_fast_replies_sample_p: Best for fast replies, sample photos, and production updates
text_181_book_a_factory_tour_or_product: Book a factory tour or product sample review. We arrange airport pickup from Shanghai Pudong (PVG), 1 hour by high-speed rail.
text_190_suzhou_industrial_park_1_hour: Yongqiao Economic Development Zone, Suzhou, Anhui — factory tours available Mon–Sat.
text_191_standard_terms_governing_all_q: Standard terms governing all quotations, orders, and shipments from EDAR Rubber & Plastic Co., Ltd.
text_198_all_quotations_are_issued_in_u: All quotations are issued in USD under FOB Shanghai or FOB Ningbo Incoterms 2020, unless otherwise specified in writing. Prices are valid for 30 days from the date of issue and subject to raw material index adjustments beyond that period.
text_202_all_esd_mats_carry_a_2_year_li: All ESD mats carry a 2-year limited warranty against manufacturing defects under proper storage and usage conditions. Warranty does not cover mechanical damage, chemical exposure outside product spec, or improper grounding.
text_204_claims_for_visible_defects_mus: Claims for visible defects must be filed within 7 days of receipt with photographic evidence. Functional or specification claims must be filed within 30 days. Approved returns are subject to a 15% restocking fee for non-defective goods.
text_206_we_collect_only_the_informatio: We collect only the information you voluntarily provide via our contact and quote forms: name, email, company, phone, country, and message content. This data is used solely to respond to your inquiry, prepare quotations, and arrange shipments.
text_208_these_terms_are_governed_by_th: These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. Any disputes shall be resolved through friendly negotiation, failing which by China International Economic and Trade Arbitration Commission (CIETAC) in Shanghai.
hero.eyebrow: LEADING MANUFACTURER OF ESD MAT SINCE 1998
hero.title: Factory-Direct ESD Rubber Mats | 25 Years, 30+ Lines, 50+ Countries
hero.sub: Tired of ESD failures costing your yield? Our dual-layer rubber mats deliver guaranteed 10⁶–10⁹ Ω point-to-point resistance, batch after batch. RoHS 2.0 + SGS tested — at 1/10 the price of branded mats. Factory-direct from our 18,000m² plant since 1998.
hero.cta_quote: Get Factory Price — Limited Production Slots →
users.title: Trusted by Global Electronics Leaders
users.sub: Active OEM supply relationships with leading electronics brands — from semiconductor fabs to EMS assembly lines. Verified references available on request.
why.title: Why 500+ Customers Trust EDAR
why.sub: Five pillars of our manufacturing promise — built on 25+ years of ESD material science.

who.eyebrow: LEADING MANUFACTURER OF ESD MAT SINCE 1998
who.title: Who We Are
who.subtitle: Welcome to EDAR ESD mat
who.desc: EDAR Rubber & Plastic Co., Ltd — manufacturing & trading combo, producing and exporting various ESD rubber mats for South-East Asia and the Americas. Top-quality products made from natural rubber with edible oil, ensuring SGS and RoHS 2.0 certification. SGS tested several times every year to guarantee quality and maximize security.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Quick answers about MOQ, lead time, payment, and samples.
faq.q1: What is your MOQ and lead time?
faq.a1: Standard sizes: MOQ 50 rolls. Custom sizes/colors/logos: MOQ 100 rolls. No MOQ for samples. Sample lead time: 7 days. Production lead time: 15–25 working days after PO confirmation.
faq.q2: What payment terms do you accept?
faq.a2: T/T 30% deposit, 70% before shipment (standard). L/C at sight for established accounts. Western Union / PayPal for sample orders. FOB Shanghai/Ningbo or CIF/CNF/DDP to major ports.
faq.q3: How do I get a free sample?
faq.a3: Free sample with shipping at your cost (DHL/FedEx 3–5 days). Just tell us: thickness (1.6–5mm), color, dimensions, and your delivery address. We ship within 7 days of request.
who.overlay: See How We Make Your Mats — 3-Min Factory Tour
quote.urgency: Send your specs today — get a firm quote within 24 hours and a free sample in 7 days. Production lead time: 15–25 working days after PO.
text_062_multi_port_ddp_dap_shipping_to_: Multi-port DDP/DAP shipping to 50+ countries, real-time shipment tracking, and a dedicated bilingual account manager for every order. Manufacturing defects are replaced at no cost — your account manager handles the entire claim, zero paperwork on your side.
text_073_qc_philosophy_title: How We Guarantee Quality — At Every Stage
text_074_qc_philosophy_sub: From raw material intake to your loading dock — four checkpoints, zero shortcuts. Every mat traced, every batch tested.
